_meta.description: Look up a group by name and return its member count and member list. Navigates to /organization/groups, searches for the group, navigates to its detail page, and reads the membership data.

group_name.description: Name of the group to look up (partial match supported via search).

notes: TIER WARNING: Groups feature requires a Business plan on this YeshID account. The current org is on a free/trial tier — the groups table shows 'No data available' and the 'New Group' button is disabled.
This payload is forward-compatible: when groups are enabled, it will work without modification.
Group detail URL pattern: /organization/groups/{id} (UUID-based, discovered via find_row navigation).
Groups table columns observed: Group name, Type, Description, Owners, Actions.

search-input.resolveHint: Search input on the groups list page.

group-member-count.resolveHint: On the group detail page, find the member count. May appear as a badge, header stat, or table footer. Look for text near a 'Members' section heading.

group-members-table.resolveHint: Table of group members on the group detail page. Columns likely: Name, Email, Status.

chain.note: Check if groups are available. If footer shows '0-0 of 0' and no group rows, the groups feature is likely not enabled on this tier.

respond_early_data.message: Groups are not available on the current YeshID plan. Upgrade to Business plan to use groups.

chain.note: If groups table is empty due to tier, short-circuit and return informative error rather than failing silently.
Search for the group by name.
Wait for Vue search debounce to filter the table.
Click the matching group row to navigate to the group detail page.
Wait for group detail page to fully render.
Read the member count from the group detail page header or stats area.
Read the full member list from the group detail page. Columns may vary.
Return group name, member count, and full member list.
